title: Resinous Pillowy Portuguese Potato Stew
description: A creamy, resinous stew of small potatoes and mushrooms simmered with Mediterranean herbs, perfect for a cozy solo dinner.
instructions: Wash and halve the small potatoes, placing them in a steaming basket.
Steam the sliced mushrooms for 5 minutes until softened, then set aside.
Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat and sauté the chopped onion until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pot and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Pour in the white wine and let it reduce by half, about 3 minutes.
Add the halved potatoes, steamed mushrooms, vegetable broth, bay leaf, paprika, and rosemary, bringing the mixture to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes until the potatoes are tender and the stew has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, stir in chopped parsley, and serve hot.
